# core/interfaces.py
from abc import ABC, abstractmethod

# Correct: define abstract contracts in lightweight, dependency-free modules
class IStorageService(ABC):
    @abstractmethod
    def save(self, data): pass

# infrastructure/aws.py
import boto3
from core.interfaces import IStorageService

# Correct: place heavy concrete implementations in their own isolated modules
class AWSStorageService(IStorageService):
    def __init__(self):
        self.s3 = boto3.client('s3')
        
    def save(self, data):
        self.s3.put_object(Bucket="my-bucket", Key="data", Body=data)
